color_profile.description: Desaturated milsim palette — muted earth tones, low saturation, slight blue-grey cast

terrain_types.ai_prompt: wet beach sand, dark golden, footprint impressions, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
dry loose sand, light tan, wind ripples, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
wet churned mud, dark brown, boot prints, puddles, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
tropical grass ground cover, green with brown patches, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
packed brown dirt, small pebbles, dry cracks, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
weathered gray concrete, hairline cracks, surface stains, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
worn asphalt road surface, tar patches, small cracks, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
loose gravel, mixed gray and brown stones, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
natural rock face, gray with lichen, layered sedimentary texture, photorealistic PBR texture, front-facing, even lighting
shallow clear water over sand, light caustics, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
deep ocean water surface, dark blue-green, wave pattern, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
concrete rubble and debris, broken rebar, dust, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting
weathered military steel plate, rust spots, scratches, photorealistic PBR texture, front-facing, even lighting
weathered wood planks, gray-brown, splinters, nail holes, photorealistic PBR texture, front-facing, even lighting
dense tropical undergrowth, ferns and fallen leaves, photorealistic PBR texture, top-down, even lighting

destruction_stages.name: Light
destruction_stages.ai_modifier: minor surface scratches, small chips, light dust

destruction_stages.name: Moderate
destruction_stages.ai_modifier: visible cracks, chipped edges, moderate wear and staining

destruction_stages.name: Heavy
destruction_stages.ai_modifier: large cracks, broken chunks missing, heavy damage, exposed internals

destruction_stages.name: Destroyed
destruction_stages.ai_modifier: completely shattered, rubble, twisted remains, heavy debris and dust
